workflow.name: Start Workflow
workflow.description: Initiates the server status check and restart workflow.

workflow.name: Check Server Status
workflow.description: Executes a command to check the status of 'web-prod-01'.

workflow.name: Restart Server
workflow.description: Restarts 'web-prod-01' if it was found to be down.

workflow.name: Verify Server Restart
workflow.description: Re-checks the status of 'web-prod-01' after a restart attempt.

workflow.name: Notify Server Active
workflow.description: Sends an email notification that 'web-prod-01' is active.

workflow.name: Notify Server Restarted
workflow.description: Sends an email notification that 'web-prod-01' was restarted successfully.

workflow.name: Notify Restart Failure
workflow.description: Sends an email notification that 'web-prod-01' failed to restart.

workflow.name: End Workflow
workflow.description: Marks the completion of the workflow.

lint_issues.message: Empty triggers list. NetGent's _check_state() treats a state with no checks as ALWAYS matching, so this state will fire on every page and never let the workflow advance -- this is the exact bug that caused the Gmail run to time out. Every state MUST have at least one trigger.
Empty actions list, but the name/description doesn't read like a wait state. If this wasn't intentional, NetGent will do nothing here and just re-poll the same triggers.
First state doesn't trigger on chrome://new-tab-page/. This is fine ONLY if the task explicitly starts from an existing page; otherwise NetGent may never enter the workflow from a fresh tab.

Empty triggers list. NetGent's _check_state() treats a state with no checks as ALWAYS matching, so this state will fire on every page and never let the workflow advance -- this is the exact bug that caused the Gmail run to time out. Every state MUST have at least one trigger.
Empty actions list, but the name/description doesn't read like a wait state. If this wasn't intentional, NetGent will do nothing here and just re-poll the same triggers.

Empty triggers list. NetGent's _check_state() treats a state with no checks as ALWAYS matching, so this state will fire on every page and never let the workflow advance -- this is the exact bug that caused the Gmail run to time out. Every state MUST have at least one trigger.
Empty actions list, but the name/description doesn't read like a wait state. If this wasn't intentional, NetGent will do nothing here and just re-poll the same triggers.

Empty triggers list. NetGent's _check_state() treats a state with no checks as ALWAYS matching, so this state will fire on every page and never let the workflow advance -- this is the exact bug that caused the Gmail run to time out. Every state MUST have at least one trigger.
Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.

Empty actions list, but the name/description doesn't read like a wait state. If this wasn't intentional, NetGent will do nothing here and just re-poll the same triggers.

Empty triggers list. NetGent's _check_state() treats a state with no checks as ALWAYS matching, so this state will fire on every page and never let the workflow advance -- this is the exact bug that caused the Gmail run to time out. Every state MUST have at least one trigger.
Empty actions list, but the name/description doesn't read like a wait state. If this wasn't intentional, NetGent will do nothing here and just re-poll the same triggers.

Empty triggers list. NetGent's _check_state() treats a state with no checks as ALWAYS matching, so this state will fire on every page and never let the workflow advance -- this is the exact bug that caused the Gmail run to time out. Every state MUST have at least one trigger.
Empty actions list, but the name/description doesn't read like a wait state. If this wasn't intentional, NetGent will do nothing here and just re-poll the same triggers.

Empty triggers list. NetGent's _check_state() treats a state with no checks as ALWAYS matching, so this state will fire on every page and never let the workflow advance -- this is the exact bug that caused the Gmail run to time out. Every state MUST have at least one trigger.
Empty actions list, but the name/description doesn't read like a wait state. If this wasn't intentional, NetGent will do nothing here and just re-poll the same triggers.
Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab. The starting page is not guaranteed, so this state's triggers stay deliberately broad -- if none of them match, the whole workflow dead-ends here.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.google.com/

workflow.name: On Google Homepage
workflow.description: Search for a specific query on Google. Match the site broadly rather than pinning one exact landing path, which may differ between runs.
triggers: If the current URL contains google.com
If a search box with name 'q' is visible
actions: Type 'NetGent automation' into the search box with name 'q'
Press Enter

workflow.name: On Google Search Results Page
workflow.description: Click the first organic search result to navigate to the target page.
triggers: If the current URL contains google.com/search
If a search result link with text 'NetGent' is visible
actions: Click the first search result link

workflow.name: On Target Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the navigation to the target page was successful.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain google.com/search
If the current URL contains netgent.io
actions: Terminate: Successfully navigated to the first search result

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

workflow.name: Start Navigation
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to the target site.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: Login
workflow.description: Enter the provided username and password to log in to the application.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: Add Items to Cart
workflow.description: On the products page, add the specified items to the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart' next to the product 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' next to the product 'Sauce Labs Bike Light'

workflow.name: Open Shopping Cart
workflow.description: After adding items, navigate to the shopping cart page.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible (indicating items were added)
If an element with class 'shopping_cart_link' is visible
actions: Click the element with class 'shopping_cart_link'

workflow.name: Proceed to Checkout
workflow.description: From the cart page, initiate the checkout process.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If the text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: Enter Checkout Information
workflow.description: Fill in the required personal information for the checkout.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: Finish Order
workflow.description: Review the order and complete the purchase.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If the text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Finish'

workflow.name: Order Complete
workflow.description: Confirm that the order has been successfully placed.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html
If the text 'THANK YOU FOR YOUR ORDER' is visible
actions: Terminate: Order successfully placed

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, sort the products by price from low to high, add the two cheapest products to the cart, open the cart, remove one of them, and confirm exactly one item remains

workflow.name: Start Navigation
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to saucedemo.com.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: Login to SauceDemo
workflow.description: Enter the provided username and password, then click the login button.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: Sort Products and Add to Cart
workflow.description: On the products page, sort items by price from low to high and add the two cheapest to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If an element with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Select 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the first product
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the second product

workflow.name: Open Shopping Cart
workflow.description: After adding items, click the shopping cart icon to view the cart contents.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a shopping cart icon with a badge indicating 2 items is visible
actions: Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: Remove Item from Cart
workflow.description: On the cart page, remove one of the items.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If an element with text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Remove' for the first item in the cart

workflow.name: Verify Cart Contents
workflow.description: Confirm that exactly one item remains in the cart after removal.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a shopping cart icon with a badge indicating 1 item is visible
If exactly one item is listed in the cart
actions: Terminate: Exactly one item remains in the cart
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in the cart

state_names: Sort Products and Add to Cart

workflow.description: Log in to saucedemo.com with the specified credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
If a button with text 'Login' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Sort products by price low to high and add the two cheapest items to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
If a dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' is visible
actions: Select 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Remove one item from the cart and confirm only one remains.

If a div with text 'Your Cart' is visible
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Remove'
Verify that the element with class 'shopping_cart_badge' contains the text '1'

workflow.name: Cart Confirmed
workflow.description: The cart now contains exactly one item as requested.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html

actions: Terminate: Exactly one item remains in the cart
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in the cart

sentence: go to automationexercise.com, search for 'dress', add the first two products in the results to your cart, view the cart, and confirm both products are listed

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab. The starting page is not guaranteed, so this state's triggers stay deliberately broad.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: On Automation Exercise Homepage
workflow.description: Locate the search input and search for 'dress'.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If a link with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the link with text 'Products'
Type 'dress' into the input field with placeholder 'Search Product'
Click the button with class 'fa fa-search'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page
workflow.description: Add the first two products found to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products
If a heading with text 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' is visible
actions: Hover over the first product card (e.g., the first element with class 'product-image-wrapper')
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' within the first product card
Click the button with text 'Continue Shopping'
Hover over the second product card (e.g., the second element with class 'product-image-wrapper')
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' within the second product card
Click the button with text 'View Cart'

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Verify that both products are listed in the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/view_cart
If a heading with text 'Shopping Cart' is visible
If at least two rows are visible in the cart table (e.g., elements with class 'cart_info')
actions: Terminate: Both products are confirmed in the cart
workflow.end_state: Two products added to cart and confirmed

Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Locate and click the 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket' product link.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with class 'inventory_list' is visible
actions: Click the link with text 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'

workflow.name: On Fleece Jacket Product Page
workflow.description: Add the 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket' to the cart and then return to the products list.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory-item.html
If a button with text 'Add to cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart'
Click the button with text 'Back to products'

workflow.name: Back On Products Page
workflow.description: Open the shopping cart after returning from a product page.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a link with class 'shopping_cart_link' is visible
actions: Click the link with class 'shopping_cart_link'

workflow.name: On Shopping Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout from the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a button with text 'Checkout' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Your Information Page
workflow.description: Fill in the checkout details and complete the task.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input field with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input field with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

lint_issues.message: Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.
